description:
Returns a list of all timecard entries for the current date.

See [Working with Daily Logs](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/daily-logs) for information on filtering the response using the log\_date, start\_date, and end\_date parameters.

parameters.name: log_date
parameters.description: Timecard entries at the specified date. (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The beginning of the date range for timecard entries. (YYYY-MM-DD) Start date is inclusive.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end of the date range for timecard entries. (YYYY-MM-DD) End date is inclusive.

parameters.name: filters[created_by_id]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) created by the specified User IDs.
